'''thathojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:joannes|joannes]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joannes|joannes]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thathojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæthejeth|thæthejeth]] || [[word:thæthejej|thæthejej]] || [[word:thæthejesh|thæthejesh]] || [[word:thætheje|thætheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathothojoth|thathothojoth]] || [[word:thathothojoj|thathothojoj]] || [[word:thathothojosh|thathothojosh]] || [[word:thathothojo|thathothojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathojoth|thathojoth]] || [[word:thathojoj|thathojoj]] || [[word:thathojosh|thathojosh]] || [[word:thathojo|thathojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathofjoth|thathofjoth]] || [[word:thathofjoj|thathofjoj]] || [[word:thathofjosh|thathofjosh]] || [[word:thathofjof|thathofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thathojotho|thathojotho]] || [[word:thathojojo|thathojojo]] || [[word:thathojosho|thathojosho]] || [[word:thathojoko|thathojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thathojoth|thathojoth]] || [[word:thathojoj|thathojoj]] || [[word:thathojosh|thathojosh]] || [[word:thathojo|thathojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thathojothol|thathojothol]] || [[word:thathojojol|thathojojol]] || [[word:thathojoshol|thathojoshol]] || [[word:thathojokol|thathojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thathojothotho|thathojothotho]] || [[word:thathojojojo|thathojojojo]] || [[word:thathojoshosho|thathojoshosho]] || [[word:thathojoko|thathojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thathojothon|thathojothon]] || [[word:thathojojon|thathojojon]] || [[word:thathojoshon|thathojoshon]] || [[word:thathojokon|thathojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thathojothoro|thathojothoro]] || [[word:thathojojoro|thathojojoro]] || [[word:thathojoshoro|thathojoshoro]] || [[word:thathojokoro|thathojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
